source: Manually seeded from PerkValet spec documents — institutional knowledge

pages.description: Your home page — quick access to all sections of your account
Last week recap, this week events, and alerts that need your attention

common_issues.cause: Your loyalty program hasn't been running for a full week yet
resolution: Your first weekly summary will appear after 7 days of data
Make sure your POS is connected and processing transactions

pages.description: Connect your Clover or Square account to PerkValet

common_issues.cause: Your browser had a Clover tab open when you tried to connect
resolution: Close all Clover tabs in your browser
Come back to PerkValet and tap Connect again
Sign in with your normal Clover email and password

common_issues.cause: You signed in with a Clover test account instead of your real business account
resolution: Tap Connect again
Sign in with the email you use at your register every day
If unsure, check your register — go to Settings and look for the account email

common_issues.cause: The account you signed in with doesn't have owner-level access
resolution: You need the main owner login for your Clover account
This is usually the email used when the account was first created
If someone else set up your system, ask them for the owner email and password

common_issues.cause: The connection to Square didn't complete — could be a temporary Square issue
resolution: Try connecting again — most Square connection issues are temporary
Make sure you're signing in with your Square business account, not a personal account

common_issues.cause: Your POS stopped sending data to PerkValet
resolution: Check that your register is powered on and connected to WiFi
If it's running normally, go to Setup Guide and tap Reconnect
common_issues.escalate_if: Device is online but data still not flowing after reconnect

pages.description: Create and manage your loyalty programs — stamp cards, tiered rewards, referrals

common_issues.cause: You need to set up product categories before creating a promotion
resolution: Go to Products first
Add at least one category (e.g. Coffee, Pastry)
Then come back to Promotions

common_issues.cause: Most enrolled customers haven't earned stamps recently
resolution: Consider lowering the stamp threshold so customers reach rewards sooner
Try adding a bonus-stamp promotion (double stamps on slow days)
Make sure your team is asking for phone numbers at checkout

common_issues.trigger: Consumer enrolled but stampCount stays at 0
common_issues.cause: The consumer's purchases aren't being matched to their loyalty profile
resolution: Make sure your team enters the customer's phone number with each transaction
The phone number must match what the customer used to sign up

pages.description: Set up your product catalog — items, categories, descriptions

common_issues.trigger: Product avatar shows initials instead of image
common_issues.cause: The image URL might be a webpage link, not a direct image link
resolution: Use the Browse Unsplash button to find an image
Right-click the image and choose 'Copy image address' (not 'Copy link address')
Paste that direct URL into the Image URL field

pages.description: Your business performance — KPIs, trends, consumer engagement

common_issues.cause: Not enough transaction data yet — analytics need at least a week of data
resolution: Make sure your POS is connected and processing transactions
Analytics update overnight — check back tomorrow for today's numbers

pages.description: Build the right loyalty program for your goal — guided step by step

flows.description: Customer visits, pays, gets a stamp
steps: Stamp added to best loyalty card (automatic)
Customer sees stamp in their app
failure_points: Customer not enrolled → no stamp card

flows.description: Customer hits the milestone and earns a reward
steps: Associate applies discount or gift card
flows.important_note: Rewards are always for the NEXT visit — the current transaction earns the stamps, the reward waits for next time

flows.description: Customer progresses through Bronze → Silver → Gold
steps: When visits reach tier threshold, tier unlocks automatically
Each tier grants its own reward (for next visit)
Tier status is permanent — never resets
flows.important_note: Customers never lose their tier — once Gold, always Gold

flows.description: Customer refers a friend, both get rewarded
steps: Customer gets unique referral code from the app
Friend enters code when signing up
BOTH get a reward for their next visit

error_codes.cause: Session expired — log out and log back in
You don't have permission for this action — you may need owner access
The page or item you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed
Something went wrong on our end — try refreshing the page
error_codes.escalation: If this keeps happening, tap Get Help and we'll look into it

pos_connection_states.description: Connection has an issue — may need reconnection
pos_connection_states.resolution: Go to Setup Guide → Reconnect POS

pos_connection_states.description: Not connected — no transactions being captured
pos_connection_states.resolution: Go to Setup Guide → Connect your POS

promotion_types.description: Visit N times, earn a reward
Bronze → Silver → Gold with escalating rewards
promotion_types.display: Tier badges with progress to next

promotion_types.description: Bonus stamps during specific times or after absence
Refer a friend, both get rewarded
Collect items across visits for a combo deal

precedence_engine.description: When a customer has multiple loyalty programs, PerkValet automatically picks the one that benefits them most
levels: Reward ready from prior visit → surface it
Stamps closest to expiry → protect what they're about to lose
Closest to earning a reward → get them there faster
Highest reward value → give them the best deal
precedence_engine.merchant_explanation: Your customers never have to choose between programs. PerkValet handles it automatically, always in the customer's favor.
